transcript.text:
(Mysterious truck that came to Tzuyang...)
(A challenge note that)
(was sent to Tzuyang..?)
(1 vs 10)
(Mukbang)
(Mukbang competition)
(Then, what is the food...?)
(BBQ Jamaica Sotteok Chicken)
(that consists of chewy so-tteok so-tteok)
(and Jamaica jerk sauce)
(But...)
(40 packs?!)
(Competition begins now!)
(10 students will challenge Tzuyang!)
(Another obvious win for Tzuyang..?!)
- I finished it - Really?

(Finally met a good match..?) I think I can eat 3 packs alone
(The last drumstick...)
(Will Tzuyang be able to keep her pride..?!)
(Gorgeous campus with great sceneries)
(Where is this campus that looks like a castle..?)
Hello everyone!
Today, I'm in front of
the Landscape Architecture department
at Kyunghee University International Campus right now
The reason why I came here is
because there was an event on BBQ Instagram
(Why is Tzuyang here..?) and I came here to meet the winners!
(BBQ and Tzuyang's celebration event of Jamaica Sotteok Chicken)
(School attack)
(One video message was sent to BBQ Instagram)
Hello, I'm Jung Jae-ik, a 25-year-old office worker

There is a teaching assistant who helped me a lot
when I was applying to art colleges 6 years ago
I heard he's having a tough time finishing up
his graduation work with all-nighters
I couldn't say hi to him for a long time because I was busy as well
It'll be great if Tzuyang can cheer for
Kyunghee Univ. art students who are working hard for their graduation
The high school student he taught now got a job
and I'm applying for this for him!
Good luck to all the university students who are working hard for graduation!
(Came to Kyunghee University International Campus to find the protagonist of the story)
Actually, earlier this year,
I visited BBQ Chicken University
(BBQ Chicken University she visited in February) I'm here at Chicken University!
(Working hard)
(Proud to be a BBQ Chicken University student) I've received a certificate from there

so I think it'll be more meaningful today
I came to meet students who are about to graduate, right?
I couldn't come with empty hands
so BBQ sent this food truck
and prepared the new dish, Jamaica Sotteok Chicken!
(The food truck with a lot of fried chicken)
(is approaching now!)
(Arrived)
(BBQ and Tzuyang in Kyunghee University International Campus!)
(Shall we take a tour of the taste of Jamaica)
(to find out more about today's dish?)
(BBQ's signature, golden olive oil)
(With the golden olive oil, it gets crispy outside and juicy inside)
(So-tteok so-tteok as well...?)
(Crispy fried chicken)
(with so-tteok so-tteok)

(Wait, what is this sauce..?!)
(Jerk sauce)
(The nation's favorite bbq chicken with BBQ Jamaica jerk sauce)
(BBQ Jamaica So-tteok Chicken is ready!)
Ta-da! The food truck is ready like this!
BBQ released a new dish recently!
They mixed fried chicken with so-tteok so-tteok and Jamaica jerk sauce
(The nation's favorite bbq chicken) It's fried chicken that everyone can enjoy!
(Glossy..!) This must be it!
It must be a lot because of so-tteok so-tteok
(... Huh?) Do you see this guy?
(Mr. BBQ..?) He's Mr. BBQ, he should be here today
(Feels like someone's watching us..)
(Who are you..?)
(He's the cute BBQ mascot!)
He's standing over there!

(Approaching)
(Bowing) Hello
(Flap)
(Hello, I'm Mr. BBQ)
(Look over there!)
Huh? There?!
- (Yes...) - School?
10 people?
(Boxing)
Competition..?
- (Nom nom) - Eating!
Oh, I'll have an eating competition at school?
- (That's not it) - No?
(I think 10 people at school is right..)
10?!
(Pencil?)

(Drawing something...?)
- Drawing?!) - (Yes!!)
(And eating as well..?) Eating...
(One two punch)
Competition!!
Ah-ha!
I'm having an eating and drawing competition at school
Is that it?!
(The prize is...)
(BBQ JAMAICA SOTTEOK CHICKEN)
(How did I do..?)
(He's a body language master.. LOL) Then I can eat chicken?
(Let's go)
(What kind of competition is going to happen here..?!) Let's go!
(Kyunghee Univ. students are waiting for Tzuyang...)
(Tzuyang is here!)

(Oops, my comb)
(Hahaha)
(Welcome, Mr. BBQ and Tzuyang!)
I've never tried anything like this.. LOL
(How are we doing this...?)
(BBQ & Tzuyang! Mukbang vs. Croquis drawing)
(Who will be faster?)
(Rules : If 5 or more students can finish their croquis)
(while Tzuyang eats one pack, they succeed the mission!)
(If they complete the mission, BBQ will give 40 packs of chicken to the students!)
(Who will win this competition...?)
Please eat slowly today..
I don't usually eat fast..!
Slower than usual, please...
(The protagonist) How long do you usually take to finish one chicken?
I've never timed myself...

Is it with bones? It'll take a while if it's with bones
Nice...
(Started already) (The chicken is here)
(Great taste & big portions! Jamaica Sotteok Chicken) It's plenty!
I'll draw with hyperrealism(?)
(Confident) Speed is just basic
I'll get the details as well
Just as usual...
with confidence!
(Good luck!)
(Good luck to both teams for a great competition)
(Competition begins now) I'm so embarrassed right now..
(Students look very serious)
(It's not a paused screen)
It smells so good...
Sorry for eating alone...

(Very quiet and serious atmosphere...)
I don't even know what I'm doing here
(Feels like taking KSAT in front of chicken)
(Glancing)
(Mr. BBQ is frozen)
(Mr. BBQ moved a bit...)
(Tzuyang is speeding up...)
She has only 7 pieces left
(Everyone is surprised)
(Is this real...?)
She said she doesn't eat fast...
(Unpredictable intense competition...)
(Amazing croquis that are getting close to be done)
(Amazing mukbanger is also catching up)
That guy's only going for Mr. BBQ
(He's the guy)

(Mr. BBQ only)
(With the shadow of Tzuyang)
Because Mr. BBQ is the judge...
(You want to be on my good side..?)
(Remaining pieces) She's got one more piece of chicken and tteok
It's the last drumstick!
(Can't believe that she finished it so quick...)
Can I finish it?
- One bite left...?! - Yes
(Screwed...)
(I'll get the last bite now!)
(Last bite is done)
(Finished the competition with sparking lemon boy) I enjoyed it!
Wowwwww
(Clean)
(You deserve a round of applause)

(It was a piece of cake.. Hehe) It was only one pack...
(Standing ovation)
(Revealing their art piece)
Can you see?
- (Huh?) - The picture
(These are my eyes...)
(1st piece) 1, 2, 3
(The quality from the 1st piece...!)
Amazing
(Wizard Tzuyang who's vacuuming the chicken) Pass!
He can't see well!
(Scanning it...)
(Clap clap clap)
(Very satisfied)
(Agreed)
(Chicken vacuum) Wizard Tzuyang

When she started to eat the chicken,
it looked like she was absorbing it through her body
(Pass)
(Superb)
You're good at drawing
(2nd piece)
(Cute)
(He fell in love with Mr. BBQ, so cute)
Mr. BBQ, this is called, 'Mr. BBQ is cute'
(I'm cute...?)
(I'm not an easy chicken!)
Ohhhh
(Assuming that's Tzuyang...?) Is that me...?
(Pass 2)
(Mr. BBQ is quite generous)
Is this all depending on

(What about me?) Mr. BBQ?
(Yeah...)
(3rd piece)
(Reggae Mr. BBQ who fell in love with Jamaica Chicken)
Since Tzuyang is eating
(Sensible drawing that focused on Jamaica Sotteok Chicken) Jamaica Chicken, I drew reggae hair
(Cool idea)
(Reggae hair...?)
(Rubber glove looking comb)
(He's not giving the drumstick...)
(Wah)
(Give it)
(Tzuyang pass)
(That's right)
(Tzuyang, you're pretty strong...)
(4th piece)

(Tzuyang's long arms are impressive in this..!)
I put some emphasis on Mr. BBQ
(What about me...?) Everyone.... Haha
(It seems quite obvious..) I can't draw people very well
It's hard to draw the eyes, nose, and mouth, so I wrote 'Tzuyang'
(You have to draw the face)
(He got the first fail)
(I feel bad...)
(5th piece) 1, 2, 3
(Tzuyang is just a silhouette compared to Mr. BBQ...!) That's mean!
It's called
'Can't see Tzuyang'
(Glancing)
(Quality that he can't fail..)
(6th piece)
Wowwww

(Standard croquis that expressed both Tzuyang and Mr. BBQ..!)
I'll call it, 'Mr. BBQ's gaze'
You're looking at me while drooling
(Pass 5)
Five people already passed
(They got the 40 packs of chicken!) so you guys can eat the chicken already!
(Good job, guys!!!)
(Sat down comfortably... Hehe)
(7th piece reveal)
(Tzuyu enjoys BBQ with impressive expressions!)
You ate so deliciously
(Facial expression made the croquis stand out) so I drew your face like this
(Excellent)
(What is Mr. BBQ's choice...?) 1, 2, 3!
(Frozen)
(How could you?)

Give it to me!
(Not easy)
(His standards suddenly went up) Why..?
She drew well...
(Lost but it was a good fight...)
(Not a fan anymore) I don't like him
(S...Sorry)
(8th piece)
(Two cute characters with their distinguishable features)
It's super cute!
(Take a good look)
(So handsome...?)
(Great compliment)
(Is this the power of sucking up...?)
(9th piece)
(So dynamic as if it's alive..!)

(Yes, Mr. BBQ disliked Tzuyang for eating alone)
(Almost a spokesperson for Mr. BBQ) Mr. BBQ looked so sad
(Awkward for no reason)
(Pass)
(What?!) What!
(Why am I the only who failed..?) So mean! This makes no sense
(Last piece)
(Standard croquis with the perfect body ratio)
(There is a reason for Tzuyang being a shadow...!) Mr. BBQ blocked the view...
(There is a reason for Tzuyang being a shadow...!) I wanted to draw her
But Mr. BBQ totally blocked her
- (Are you blaming me?) - so I couldn't....
(Fail for you!)
(Did someone else fail too...?)
(The competition is over!)
Thank you!

Since you all
drew the pictures so well,
the food truck is
preparing the chicken
(Let's all eat together!) so I think it'd be nice to eat together!
(Choosing the BEST 3) (Prize : BBQ chicken giftcon)
I can't choose....
(Everyone did I great job) I don't know, all of them are good...
(A sudden explanation of his art piece) 'Can't see Tzuyang' means
that you were
too bright
(A ray of light...!)
(You didn't even finish the silhouette...) I wasn't even there ...
(No more excuses)
(Today's best 3 after careful consideration!)
(Time to announce the winners)

(3rd place, dynamic Tzuyang)
(Bow)
(Announcing the 2nd place)
(2nd place, beautiful Tzuyang)
(Pretty is the best...) He drew me in such a pretty way
(Who is 1st place...?)
(1st place, Wizard Tzuyang)
(Tzuyang really liked the picture hehe) I really like the picture!
(Everyone did a great job!!)
Since everyone did so well...!
It's on me...
(BBQ & Tzuyang will give giftcons to all 10 people..!)
- Everyone did so well - (Everyone did so well, agreed)
You're not giving it to all the Kyung Hee University students, right?
(Broke...)
(Shall we go to prepare the chicken?)

(A lot of delicious Jamaica jerk sauce!)
(Stacking after stacking..)
(40 packs of BBQ Jamaica Sotteok Chicken are ready!)
(It's coming to you)
(Chicken is here)
(Landscape Architecture Design students gathered here)
(The energetic students cheer endlessly!)
(1 pack per person so that it'll be enough)
Thank you
(Great taste, big portions! Jamaica Sotteok Chicken)
(All set up)
Please enjoy
Thank you!
(It's even better when you enjoy it together)
It's so delicious
Mm, it's delicious!

There are sausages and tteok
so it looks more plentiful than other regular ones
(Impressed) It's delicious
- I can't eat 1 whole pack by myself... - Really?
(The power of watching Tzuyang's mukbang) I think I got inspired to eat from watching her
I'm gonna save some and eat more at home!
I'm gonna eat this tomorrow morning too!
(Chicken rice is a must) You gotta have white rice
(Everyone will like it!)
(Freshman) How many chickens can you eat?
I...
ate 5 before
At once
(Eat mine too...) Fighting!
(Tzuyang, fighting)
I love you..!

(Cute freshmen)
Cute
Can you drink as well as you eat..?
(Thinking) I...
can drink up to 3-4 bottles...?!
(Speechless...)
(There's a rumor there's a competitive eater here...)
(He already finished one whole pack of chicken...) I finished it all
Really?
I think I can eat 3
(Shall we have a competition later?) Amazing
(Jamaica So-tteok Chicken) It's sweet, spicy, and delicious
Since it has so-tteok and a lot of seasoning
I think I could eat it without getting sick of it
I think the Jamaica sauce and the so-tteok
goes well together

I really enjoyed it!
I can even eat 3 packs!
(There's a problem...?) There was one thing missing
(I want chicken and beer) There was no beer
To explain,
when I was
21 years old! I'm 28 now
When I was 21...
I was an instructor at an art academy in Gangnam
I had this student back then
(His old student is now an office worker) he became my friend now, he applied for this for me...
Just in time..
I'm in my final year finishing up my studies
(The ex-student's support for his ex-teacher) so he did this for me
(His support definitely worked!) Looking at everyone, it definitely worked!
I thought everyone would be younger than me

since it's a university
But that's not the case
(Not younger)
Honestly,
I'm not done with my courses yet
(He's already employed) so I'm working while I'm taking courses..
(The campus life won't happen again) So I want to make a lot of memories for the rest of the year
I'm going to school with that in mind
Other students who are graduating probably think differently
I'm preparing for interviews and making my portfolio
Since it's my first time doing that,
(Already worried about leaving school) I'm a bit lost so I'm struggling right now
There's a lot of pressure
with preparing to find a job
Even though I'm graduating soon,
(Anxiety keeps creeping up) there are many things I don't know

(In between reality and dreams) Realistically, you have to get a job
(Never-ending concerns about the future) There's that kind of conflict
Adults always say,
'The best time is when you're a student'
(Can relate to the adults) Since I'm getting ready to get a job now,
I really think the best time is when you're a student
(They're experiencing the reality now..) That's right, I agree with you 100%
During this transitional period,
I had a lot of worries and thoughts
'Will I be able to do well?' or
'Everyone around me seems to do so well so I'm worried'
I've said that a lot
(Let go of your worries) I hope you have more confidence
about your skills
(I'm cheering for everyone) I think everyone can get a job
You've worked hard for 4 years

(I hope everyone who is graduating soon succeeds) Congratulations to those who got a job
and for those who haven't got a job yet,
(Best wishes for your endeavors!) you'll get one soon so keep trying!
(Mr. BBQ is back)
(Everyone...!)
(I hope you succeed in getting jobs...!!)
(Success bell)
(Mr. BBQ, you worked hard today as well hehe)
Let's give a round of applause to BBQ
(Thank you to the BBQ staff for helping us with the shooting) who prepared all the chicken today
BBQ, I love you!
It was great eating BBQ chicken today
And...
(With final year students) I had a great conversation with them about graduation and finding a job
(A great time filled with food and fun) It was very fun and also meaningful to share everyone's stories
(A great time filled with food and fun) I really enjoyed this time with them

You can do it!
- Thank you for the meal today! - BBQ fighting!
